questions.question: Explain the concept of Exhaustive Search and its applications, including the Travelling Salesman Problem. Describe the steps involved in implementing this approach
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the steps involved

questions.question: A city has 5 cities: A, B, C, D, E. Each city has a distance from the other cities as shown in the table below. Using the Exhaustive Search approach, find the shortest possible tour that visits each city exactly once and returns to the starting city. Table not provided in the question. Use a flowchart or diagram to represent the steps involved. (5 marks for flowchart and 10 marks for the solution)

What are the advantages and disadvantages of using the Exhaustive Search approach for solving the Travelling Salesman Problem? Provide examples of scenarios where each approach would be more suitable. (10 marks)
